description: From the manufacturer STANLEY is a global manufacturer of hand tools, mechanics and accessories, and a flagship brand of the Stanley Black & Decker Corporation. Since its founding in 1843, STANLEY has been committed to providing smart, sturdy, pioneering and appropriate products to every task to professionals around the world. For over 170 years, STANLEY has been responsible for bringing new levels of performance to users, by creating some of the most useful tools, including the Bailey Carpenter Brush, Surform Shaper, PowerLock Tape Measure and more recently, the FatMax product line. The Stanley tool division is possibly the company's most well-known division but also highlights other divisions such as STANLEY Security, STANLEY Hardware, STANLEY Engineered Fastening, and STANLEY Infrastructure. Versatility matters When it comes to storing tools, we know not everyone seeks the same solution. That's why the PRO-STACK stackable storage system can be configured based on the needs of every specialist, because versatility is important. Designed with unique and robust interlocking latches, PRO-STACK offers multiple options, becoming the ideal storage solution, whatever the job is done. Put your tools in order A versatile and customisable storage system for your home, garage or workshop. STANLEY's new TRACKWALL system offers total flexibility to store tools, garden equipment and much more! Reliability Matters From dawn to sunset Our new and improved V20 Lithium-Ion 18V Battery from STANLEY FATMAX delivers all the performance you need for a good day of work... and more. Because reliability matters.
